description: Symfony AI bridge — adapters connecting the agent loop to the Symfony AI ecosystem (platform, tool executor, message mapping, streaming).

files.responsibility: Implements PlatformInterface — wraps Symfony AI Platform for LLM invocation.
Invokes the Symfony AI platform with tool calls and streaming support — handles the raw provider interaction.
Adapts Symfony AI tool execution to the agent loop's ToolExecutorInterface contract.
Maps between AgentMessage/MessageBag and Symfony AI message formats — bidirectional conversion.
Reduces streaming deltas into a coherent assistant message — accumulates text chunks during LLM streaming.
Implements CancellationTokenInterface — checks RunStatus to determine if cancellation was requested for a run.
